{% block extra_js %}
<script>
const API_BASE = '/api/v1/admin';
const TOKEN = 'admin888';

let cinemas = [];

// å è½½å½±é¢åè¡¨
async function loadCinemas() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/cinemas`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    cinemas = await res.json();
    renderCinemas();
}

// æ¸²æå½±é¢åè¡¨
function renderCinemas() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('cinemasList');
    document.getElementById('cinemaCount').textContent = cinemas.length;

    if (!cinemas.length) {
        tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center">ææ å½±é¢ï¼ç¹å»"ä»èé¡¹ç®åæ­¥å½±é¢"æé®å¯¼å¥</td></tr>';
        return;
    }

    tbody.innerHTML = cinemas.map(c => `
        <tr>
            <td>${c.name}</td>
            <td><code>${c.code}</code></td>
            <td><span class="badge bg-primary">${c.priority}</span></td>
            <td>
                ${(c.tags || []).map(t => `<span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">${t}</span>`).join('')}
            </td>
            <td>${c.manager_contact || '-'}</td>
            <td>
                <span class="badge ${c.is_active ? 'bg-success' : 'bg-secondary'}">
                    ${c.is_active ? 'å¯ç¨' : 'ç¦ç¨'}
                </span>
            </td>
            <td>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" onclick="editCinema(${c.id})">
                    <i class="bi bi-pencil"></i> ç¼è¾
                </button>
            </td>
        </tr>
    `).join('');
}

// åæ­¥å½±é¢
async function syncCinemas() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/mock/generate?count=1&by_status=false`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
        alert('å½±é¢æ°æ®å·²åæ­¥');
        loadCinemas();
    }
}

// ç¼è¾å½±é¢
function editCinema(id) {
    const cinema = cinemas.find(c => c.id === id);
    if (!cinema) return;

    document.getElementById('cinemaId').value = id;
    document.getElementById('cinemaName').value = cinema.name;
    document.getElementById('cinemaPriority').value = cinema.priority;
    document.getElementById('managerContact').value = cinema.manager_contact || '';

    // è®¾ç½®æ ç­¾
    const tags = cinema.tags || [];
    document.getElementById('tag1').checked = tags.includes('åºé¿ç´ä¾');
    document.getElementById('tag2').checked = tags.includes('ä»æ¥ç¹ä»·');
    document.getElementById('tag3').checked = tags.includes('ç§åºç¥¨');
    document.getElementById('tag4').checked = tags.includes('å¤é¨è°ç¥¨');

    new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('cinemaModal')).show();
}

// ä¿å­å½±é¢
async function saveCinema() {
    const id = document.getElementById('cinemaId').value;

    // æ¶éæ ç­¾
    const tags = [];
    if (document.getElementById('tag1').checked) tags.push('åºé¿ç´ä¾');
    if (document.getElementById('tag2').checked) tags.push('ä»æ¥ç¹ä»·');
    if (document.getElementById('tag3').checked) tags.push('ç§åºç¥¨');
    if (document.getElementById('tag4').checked) tags.push('å¤é¨è°ç¥¨');

    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/cinemas/${id}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}`,
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
            priority: parseInt(document.getElementById('cinemaPriority').value),
            tags: tags,
            manager_contact: document.getElementById('managerContact').value || null
        })
    });

    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
        bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('cinemaModal')).hide();
        loadCinemas();
    }
}

// åå§å
loadCinemas();
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
const API_BASE = '/api/v1/admin';
const TOKEN = 'admin888';

let codeWords = { blessing: [], number: [] };
let recentOrders = [];

// å è½½æå·åè¡¨
async function loadCodeWords() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/code-words`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    const words = await res.json();

    codeWords.blessing = words.filter(w => w.type === 'blessing');
    codeWords.number = words.filter(w => w.type === 'number');

    renderWords();
}

// æ¸²ææå·åè¡¨
function renderWords() {
    // ç¥ç¦è¯­
    const blessingList = document.getElementById('blessingList');
    blessingList.innerHTML = codeWords.blessing.map(w => `
        <span class="badge bg-primary px-3 py-2" style="font-size: 14px;">
            ${w.word}
            <i class="bi bi-x ms-1" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="deleteWord(${w.id})"></i>
        </span>
    `).join('') || '<span class="text-muted">ææ ç¥ç¦è¯­æå·</span>';

    // ç»è®¡
    document.getElementById('totalWords').textContent = codeWords.blessing.length + codeWords.number.length;
}

// æ·»å æå·
function addCodeWord(type) {
    document.getElementById('wordType').value = type;
    document.getElementById('wordContent').value = '';
    new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('addWordModal')).show();
}

// æäº¤æå·
async function submitWord() {
    const type = document.getElementById('wordType').value;
    const word = document.getElementById('wordContent').value.trim();

    if (!word) return;

    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/code-words`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}`,
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ word, type })
    });

    if (res.ok) {
        bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('addWordModal')).hide();
        loadCodeWords();
    }
}

// å é¤æå·
async function deleteWord(id) {
    if (!confirm('ç¡®å®å é¤è¯¥æå·ï¼')) return;
    // TODO: è°ç¨å é¤API
    loadCodeWords();
}

// å è½½æè¿ä½¿ç¨æåµ
async function loadRecentUsage() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/code-words/usage`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    const data = await res.json();

    document.getElementById('usedToday').textContent = data.used_today || 0;
    document.getElementById('usedWeek').textContent = data.used_week || 0;
    document.getElementById('activeOrders').textContent = data.active_orders || 0;
    if (data.pool_range) {
        document.getElementById('poolRange').textContent = data.pool_range;
    }

    recentOrders = data.recent || [];
    renderRecent();
}

// æ¸²ææè¿ä½¿ç¨
function renderRecent() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('recentWords');

    if (!recentOrders.length) {
        tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center">ææ æ°æ®</td></tr>';
        return;
    }

    tbody.innerHTML = recentOrders.map(o => `
        <tr>
            <td><span class="badge bg-success">${o.code_word}</span></td>
            <td>${o.code_word_type === 'blessing' ? 'ç¥ç¦è¯­' : 'åä½æ°å­'}</td>
            <td><a href="#" onclick="showOrder('${o.order_no}')">${o.order_no}</a></td>
            <td>${o.movie_name}</td>
            <td>${o.ticketed_at}</td>
            <td><span class="badge bg-${o.status === 'ticketed' ? 'warning' : 'success'}">${o.status === 'ticketed' ? 'æªåç¥¨' : 'å·²åç¥¨'}</span></td>
        </tr>
    `).join('');
}

// åå§å
loadCodeWords();
loadRecentUsage();

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
const API_BASE = '/api/v1/admin';
const TOKEN = 'admin888';

const STATUS_MAP = {
    'pending': { label: 'å¾æ¯ä»', class: 'secondary' },
    'paid': { label: 'å¾æ¥å', class: 'warning' },
    'accepted': { label: 'å·²æ¥å', class: 'info' },
    'ticketed': { label: 'å·²åºç¥¨', class: 'success' },
    'completed': { label: 'å·²å®æ', class: 'primary' },
    'refunded': { label: 'å·²éæ¬¾', class: 'danger' },
    'cancelled': { label: 'å·²åæ¶', class: 'secondary' }
};

const CHANNEL_MAP = {
    'manager': 'å½±é¢ç»ç',
    'api': 'APIæ¸ é',
    'self': 'èªå·±æ¾å¸',
    'other': 'å¶ä»'
};

let orders = [];
let channels = [];

// å è½½è®¢å
async function loadOrders() {
    const status = document.getElementById('statusFilter').value;
    const url = status ? `${API_BASE}/orders?status=${status}` : `${API_BASE}/orders`;
    const res = await fetch(url, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    orders = await res.json();
    renderOrders();
}

// æ¸²æè®¢ååè¡¨
function renderOrders() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('ordersList');

    if (!orders.length) {
        tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center py-4">ææ è®¢å</td></tr>';
        return;
    }

    tbody.innerHTML = orders.map(o => `
        <tr onclick="showOrderDetail('${o.order_no}')" style="cursor:pointer">
            <td><code>${o.order_no}</code></td>
            <td>
                <strong>${o.movie_name}</strong><br>
                <small class="text-muted">${o.cinema_name}</small>
            </td>
            <td>
                ${o.show_date}<br>
                <strong>${o.show_time}</strong>
                ${o.hall_name ? `<br><small class="text-muted">${o.hall_name}</small>` : ''}
            </td>
            <td>
                ${o.seats || '-'}<br>
                <small class="text-muted">${o.seat_count}å¼  ${o.seat_preference || ''}</small>
            </td>
            <td>
                <strong>Â¥${o.total_price}</strong><br>
                <small class="text-muted">Â¥${o.unit_price}/å¼ </small>
            </td>
            <td>
                <span class="badge bg-${STATUS_MAP[o.status]?.class || 'secondary'}">
                    ${STATUS_MAP[o.status]?.label || o.status}
                </span>
            </td>
            <td>${o.ticket_channel_name || '-'}</td>
            <td>
                ${o.code_word ? `<span class="badge bg-success">${o.code_word}</span>` : '-'}
            </td>
            <td>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); showOrderDetail('${o.order_no}')">>
                    è¯¦æ
                </button>
            </td>
        </tr>
    `).join('');
}

// å è½½æ¸ é
async function loadChannels() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/channels`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    channels = await res.json();
}

// æ¾ç¤ºè®¢åè¯¦æ
async function showOrderDetail(orderNo) {
    const order = orders.find(o => o.order_no === orderNo);
    if (!order) return;

    document.getElementById('orderDetail').innerHTML = `
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <h6 class="text-muted border-bottom pb-2">è®¢åä¿¡æ¯</h6>
                <table class="table table-sm">
                    <tr><td width="100">è®¢åå·</td><td><code>${order.order_no}</code></td></tr>
                    <tr><td>ç¶æ</td><td><span class="badge bg-${STATUS_MAP[order.status]?.class}">${STATUS_MAP[order.status]?.label}</span></td></tr>
                    <tr><td>åå»ºæ¶é´</td><td>${order.created_at || '-'}</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>æ¯ä»æ¶é´</td><td>${order.paid_at || '-'}</td></tr>
                </table>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <h6 class="text-muted border-bottom pb-2">çµå½±ä¿¡æ¯</h6>
                <table class="table table-sm">
                    <tr><td width="100">çµå½±</td><td><strong>${order.movie_name}</strong></td></tr>
                    <tr><td>å½±é¢</td><td>${order.cinema_name}</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>åºæ¬¡</td><td>${order.show_date} ${order.show_time}</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>å½±å</td><td>${order.hall_name || '-'}</td></tr>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row mt-3">
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <h6 class="text-muted border-bottom pb-2">åº§ä½ä¿¡æ¯</h6>
                <table class="table table-sm">
                    <tr><td width="100">ç¥¨æ°</td><td>${order.seat_count}å¼ </td></tr>
                    <tr><td>åº§ä½åå¥½</td><td>${order.seat_preference || 'ä¸é'}</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>å®éåº§ä½</td><td><strong class="text-primary">${order.seats || '-'}</strong></td></tr>
                </table>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <h6 class="text-muted border-bottom pb-2">æ¯ä»ä¿¡æ¯</h6>
                <table class="table table-sm">
                    <tr><td width="100">åä»·</td><td>Â¥${order.unit_price}</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>æ»ä»·</td><td><strong class="text-danger">Â¥${order.total_price}</strong></td></tr>
                    <tr><td>æå·</td><td>${order.code_word ? `<span class="badge bg-success fs-6">${order.code_word}</span>` : '-'}</td></tr>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
        ${order.remark ? `<div class="alert alert-info mt-2 mb-0"><strong>å¤æ³¨:</strong> ${order.remark}</div>` : ''}
        ${order.admin_note ? `<div class="alert alert-warning mt-2 mb-0"><strong>ç®¡çåå¤æ³¨:</strong> ${order.admin_note}</div>` : ''}
    `;

    // æä½æé®
    let actions = '';
    if (order.status === 'paid') {
        actions = `
            <select class="form-select form-select-sm d-inline-block w-auto me-2" id="selectChannel">
                <option value="">éæ©åºç¥¨æ¸ é</option>
                ${channels.map(c => `<option value="${c.id}">${c.name}</option>`).join('')}
            </select>
            <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" onclick="acceptOrder('${orderNo}')">æ¥å</button>
            <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" onclick="showRefundModal('${orderNo}')">æç»éæ¬¾</button>
        `;
    } else if (order.status === 'accepted') {
        actions = `
            <button type="button" class="btn btn-success" onclick="showTicketModal('${orderNo}')">åºç¥¨</button>
        `;
    }
    actions += '<button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">å³é­</button>';
    document.getElementById('orderActions').innerHTML = actions;

    new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('orderModal')).show();
}

// æ¥å
async function acceptOrder(orderNo) {
    const channelId = document.getElementById('selectChannel')?.value || null;
    const channelName = channelId ? document.getElementById('selectChannel').selectedOptions[0]?.text : '';
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/orders/${orderNo}/accept`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}`,
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ channel_id: channelId ? parseInt(channelId) : null })
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
        bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('orderModal')).hide();
        showToast(`å·²æ¥å${channelName ? 'ï¼æ¸ éï¼' + channelName : ''}`);
        loadOrders();
        loadStats();
    }
}

// æ¾ç¤ºåºç¥¨æ¨¡ææ¡
function showTicketModal(orderNo) {
    document.getElementById('ticketOrderNo').value = orderNo;
    document.getElementById('seats').value = '';
    document.getElementById('codeWord').value = '';
    document.getElementById('ticketCode').value = '';
    // é»è®¤ä½¿ç¨åä½æ°å­æå·
    document.getElementById('codeWordType').value = 'number';
    bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('orderModal')).hide();
    new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('ticketModal')).show();
}

// æºè½åéæå·
async function autoAssignCodeWord() {
    const type = document.getElementById('codeWordType').value;
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/code-words/assign?type=${type}`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.code_word) {
        document.getElementById('codeWord').value = data.code_word;
    }
}

// æäº¤åºç¥¨
async function submitTicket() {
    const orderNo = document.getElementById('ticketOrderNo').value;
    const codeWord = document.getElementById('codeWord').value;
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/orders/${orderNo}/ticket`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}`,
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
            seats: document.getElementById('seats').value,
            code_word: codeWord,
            code_word_type: document.getElementById('codeWordType').value,
            ticket_code: document.getElementById('ticketCode').value || null
        })
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
        bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('ticketModal')).hide();
        showToast(`å·²åºç¥¨ï¼æå·ï¼${codeWord}`);
        loadOrders();
        loadStats();
    }
}

// æ¾ç¤ºéæ¬¾æ¨¡ææ¡
function showRefundModal(orderNo) {
    document.getElementById('refundOrderNo').value = orderNo;
    bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('orderModal')).hide();
    new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('refundModal')).show();
}

// æäº¤éæ¬¾
async function submitRefund() {
    const orderNo = document.getElementById('refundOrderNo').value;
    const couponAmount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('couponAmount').value);
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/orders/${orderNo}/reject`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}`,
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
            reason: document.getElementById('refundReason').value,
            coupon_amount: couponAmount
        })
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
        bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('refundModal')).hide();
        let msg = `å·²éæ¬¾ Â¥${data.refund_amount}`;
        if (couponAmount > 0) {
            msg += `ï¼è¡¥å¿å¸ Â¥${couponAmount}`;
        }
        showToast(msg);
        loadOrders();
        loadStats();
    }
}

// æ¾ç¤º Toast æç¤º
function showToast(message) {
    document.getElementById('toastMessage').textContent = message;
    const toast = new bootstrap.Toast(document.getElementById('successToast'));
    toast.show();
}

// å è½½ç»è®¡æ°æ®
async function loadStats() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/stats`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    const stats = await res.json();

    // æ´æ°æç¶æåç±»çç»è®¡
    if (stats.by_status) {
        for (const status of ['paid', 'accepted', 'ticketed', 'refunded']) {
            const s = stats.by_status[status];
            document.getElementById(`${status}Amount`).textContent = 'Â¥' + s.amount.toFixed(0);
            document.getElementById(`${status}Count`).textContent = s.count;
            document.getElementById(`${status}Seats`).textContent = s.seats;
        }
    }
}

// çææµè¯æ°æ®
async function loadMockData() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/mock/generate`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
        showToast(`å·²çæ ${data.count} æ¡æµè¯è®¢å`);
        loadOrders();
        loadStats();
    }
}

// åå§å
loadChannels();
loadOrders();
loadStats();
</script>

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
const API_BASE = '/api/v1/admin';
const TOKEN = 'admin888';

const STATUS_INFO = {
    'normal': { label: 'æ­£å¸¸æ¥å', class: 'bg-success' },
    'overload': { label: 'çåæ¨¡å¼', class: 'bg-warning' },
    'closed': { label: 'æçä¼æ¯', class: 'bg-danger' }
};

// å è½½ç³»ç»ç¶æ
async function loadStatus() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/system/status`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    const data = await res.json();

    // è®¾ç½®ç¶æ
    const status = data.status?.replace(/"/g, '') || 'normal';
    if (status === 'normal') {
        document.getElementById('statusNormal').checked = true;
    } else if (status === 'overload') {
        document.getElementById('statusOverload').checked = true;
    } else if (status === 'closed') {
        document.getElementById('statusClosed').checked = true;
    }

    // æ´æ°ç¶æå¾½ç« 
    updateStatusBadge(status);

    // è®¾ç½®å¬å
    document.getElementById('announcement').value = data.announcement?.replace(/"/g, '') || '';
}

// æ´æ°ç¶æå¾½ç« 
function updateStatusBadge(status) {
    const badge = document.getElementById('currentStatusBadge');
    const info = STATUS_INFO[status] || STATUS_INFO['normal'];
    badge.className = `badge ${info.class}`;
    badge.textContent = info.label;
}

// ä¿å­ç¶æ
async function saveStatus() {
    const status = document.querySelector('input[name="status"]:checked')?.value || 'normal';
    const announcement = document.getElementById('announcement').value;

    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/system/status`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}`,
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ status, announcement })
    });

    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
        updateStatusBadge(status);
        alert('ä¿å­æå');
    }
}

// å è½½æå·åº
async function loadCodeWords() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/code-words`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    const words = await res.json();

    const container = document.getElementById('codeWordsList');
    container.innerHTML = words.map(w => `
        <span class="badge bg-secondary me-1 mb-1">
            ${w.word}
            <small class="text-muted">(${w.type === 'blessing' ? 'ç¥ç¦' : 'æ°å­'})</small>
        </span>
    `).join('');
}

// æ·»å æå·
async function addCodeWord() {
    const word = document.getElementById('newCodeWord').value.trim();
    const type = document.getElementById('newCodeWordType').value;

    if (!word) return;

    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/code-words`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}`,
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ word, type })
    });

    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
        document.getElementById('newCodeWord').value = '';
        loadCodeWords();
    }
}

// å è½½æ¸ é
async function loadChannels() {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/channels`, {
        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${TOKEN}` }
    });
    const channels = await res.json();

    const container = document.getElementById('channelsList');
    container.innerHTML = `
        <ul class="list-group list-group-flush">
            ${channels.map(c => `
                <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">
                    <div>
                        <strong>${c.name}</strong>
                        <br><small class="text-muted">${c.description || ''}</small>
                    </div>
                    <span class="badge bg-${c.type === 'manager' ? 'primary' : c.type === 'api' ? 'success' : 'secondary'}">${c.type}</span>
                </li>
            `).join('')}
        </ul>
    `;
}

// åå§å
loadStatus();
loadCodeWords();
loadChannels();
</script>

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
æµè¯éç½®
"""
import asyncio
import pytest
from httpx import AsyncClient, ASGITransport
from sqlmodel import SQLModel
from sqlmodel.ext.asyncio.session import AsyncSession, AsyncEngine
from sqlalchemy import create_engine

from app.main import app
from app.database import get_session


# æµè¯æ°æ®åºå¼æ
test_engine = None


async def get_test_session():
    """è·åæµè¯æ°æ®åºä¼è¯"""
    global test_engine
    if test_engine is None:
        test_engine = AsyncEngine(
            create_engine(
                "sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:",
                echo=False,
                future=True
            )
        )
        async with test_engine.begin() as conn:
            await conn.run_sync(SQLModel.metadata.create_all)

    return AsyncSession(test_engine)


@pytest.fixture
async def client():
    """åå»ºæµè¯å®¢æ·ç«¯"""
    # è¦çæ°æ®åºä¼è¯
    app.dependency_overrides[get_session] = get_test_session

    async with AsyncClient(
        transport=ASGITransport(app=app),
        base_url="http://test"
    ) as client:
        yield client

    app.dependency_overrides.clear()


@pytest.fixture
async def session():
    """è·åæµè¯æ°æ®åºä¼è¯"""
    async with await get_test_session() as session:
        yield session

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
è®¢åæµè¯
"""
import pytest
from httpx import AsyncClient


class TestOrder:
    """è®¢å API æµè¯"""

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_create_order(self, client: AsyncClient):
        """æµè¯åå»ºè®¢å"""
        response = await client.post(
            "/api/v1/orders",
            json={
                "cinema_code": "jc",
                "cinema_name": "éåå½±é¢",
                "movie_name": "ç­è¾£æ»ç«",
                "show_date": "2026-03-06",
                "show_time": "14:30",
                "seat_count": 2,
                "unit_price": 35.0,
                "seat_preference": "å°½éä¸­é´"
            }
        )

        assert response.status_code == 200
        data = response.json()
        assert "order_no" in data
        assert data["cinema_name"] == "éåå½±é¢"
        assert data["status"] == "pending"

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_get_order_not_found(self, client: AsyncClient):
        """æµè¯è·åä¸å­å¨çè®¢å"""
        response = await client.get("/api/v1/orders/T123456")
        assert response.status_code == 404

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_get_orders(self, client: AsyncClient):
        """æµè¯è·åè®¢ååè¡¨"""
        response = await client.get("/api/v1/orders")
        assert response.status_code == 200
        assert isinstance(response.json(), list)


class TestAdminOrder:
    """ç®¡çåå°è®¢åæµè¯"""

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_get_orders_unauthorized(self, client: AsyncClient):
        """æµè¯æªææè®¿é®"""
        response = await client.get("/api/v1/admin/orders")
        assert response.status_code == 401

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_get_orders_authorized(self, client: AsyncClient):
        """æµè¯ææè®¿é®"""
        response = await client.get(
            "/api/v1/admin/orders",
            headers={"Authorization": "Bearer admin888"}
        )
        assert response.status_code == 200

    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_get_stats(self, client: AsyncClient):
        """æµè¯ç»è®¡æ°æ®"""

            "/api/v1/admin/stats",
